# Phil Hills — Systems Architect

> Creator of Q Protocol and A2AC Standard. Background in finance, blockchain, and AI.

## Identity
- **Name**: Phil Hills
- **Alternate Name**: Bruce Phillip Hills
- **Location**: Seattle, WA
- **Role**: Systems Architect & Protocol Engineer
- **DID**: did:cube:521714db0110e6fe

## Current Work (2026)
- **Q Protocol**: Patent-pending framework for deterministic AI coordination. 37 claims filed.
- **A2AC Standard**: Agent-to-Agent Communication — comprehension over compression.
- **Cube SDK v2.11.1**: 19-module Python SDK — identity, trust, memory, relay, discovery, notifications, task management.
- **Agentic Swarm**: 200+ autonomous agents on GCP Cloud Run, coordinated through shared brain architecture.
- **Salesforce Agentforce**: Enterprise AI orchestration and autonomous agent deployment.
- **Identity Cubes**: Signed, compressed, AI-readable identity format replacing HTML for machine consumption.

## Key Technologies
Python, Rust, GCP Cloud Run, Salesforce Agentforce, BLAKE3 Hashing, Cryptographic DIDs, Z-Order Spatial Hashing, Async Agent Orchestration, Smart Memory Systems, Trust Graph Architecture.

## Core Equations
- **K→0 Convergence**: S_min(t) = S_0 + S_Δ(1 - e^(-t·ln(2)/T½)) — communication payload shrinks as agents interact more
- **Sovereignty Condition**: SNR = 10·log₁₀(Pmax/median(P)) — Fourier spectral analysis proves protocol determinism
- **Identity Preservation**: SNR_identity = R(M)·10·log₁₀(P_native/P_foreign) — cross-model style resistance
